### Post by mr.eslamo on 2011-09-20
Dear all

For The quraan Site please download the fonts package and run this commands to install it

[http://www.4shared.com/file/jvf9xEjA/fontstar.html](http://www.4shared.com/file/jvf9xEjA/fontstar.html)

sudo cp PDMS_SindhiMansehra.ttf /usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/
sudo cp PDMS_Saleem_QuranFontQEShip.ttf /usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/
sudo cp PDMS_IslamicFont.ttf /usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/

This will solve your problem ISA
